properties.verseOrder: V1 V2 V3 V4 V5 V6 V7

verse.name: V1
verse.lines: Almighty God, the great I Am, Immovable Rock, omnipotent, Powerful, awesome Lord Victorious Warrior, Commanding King of kings Mighty Conqueror, and the only time The only time I ever saw Him run

verse.name: V2
verse.lines: Was when He ran to me, He took me in His arms Held my head to His chest, Said, "My son's come home again." Lifted my face, wiped the tears from my eyes With forgiveness in His voice He said, "Son do you know I still love you?" He caught me by surprise when God ran

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: The day I left home I knew I'd broken His heart And I wondered then if things could ever be the same Then one night I remembered His love for me And down that dusty road ahead I could see It was the only time, it was the only time I ever saw Him run

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: And then He ran to me, He took me in His arms Held my head to His chest, Said, "My son’s come home again." Lifted my face, wiped the tears from my eyes With forgiveness in His voice He said, "Son do you know I still love you?" He caught me by surprise as He brought me to my knees When God ran I saw Him run to me

verse.name: V5
verse.lines: I was so ashamed, All alone and so far away But now I know He's been waiting for this day

verse.name: V6
verse.lines: I saw Him run to me, He took me in His arms Held my head to His chest, said, "My son’s come home again." Lifted my face, wiped the tears from my eyes With forgiveness in His voice, I felt His love for me again

verse.name: V7
verse.lines: He ran to me, He took me in His arms Held my head to His chest, said, "My son’s come home again" Lifted my face, wiped the tears from my eyes With forgiveness in His voice He said, "Son," He called me Son He said, "Son do you know I still love you?" He ran to me (When God ran) (I saw Him run to me) And then I ran to Him (When God ran) When God ran
